interactions.body: (AI BW PRODQs - Early settlement fees SMS) Hi Zachery, we don't charge our customers for settling their loan early, or making extra payments. We offer more flexible loans, and don't believe in hidden fees or charges. Our interest is calculated daily, so you only pay for the amount of time you have the loan for. Thanks, Together Loans

Hi Zachery, we offer loans between $3,000 and $10,000 over 2 to 5 years, depending on how much you borrow and the state you live in. It’s important to note that our interest is calculated daily, so you can settle early, make a large, one-off overpayment or regular overpayments, which will reduce your balance and save you money in the long run. You can amend your details or change your loan amount here: https://tcrdt.com/s/UIKV5WBI To continue your application, you will need a cosigner. Please, use this link to invite them: https://tcrdt.com/s/A3JWAKSR  We aim to pay out every loan within 24-48 hours of the cosigner being accepted. If you and your cosigner complete the application online and all checks are completed without issue, we could get the money to you sooner! If you need any help, just let me know. Thanks, Together Loans

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : 0624012702071423090107] Hi Zachery,

Thank you for contacting Together Loans, your message is really important to us.

I can see that your application is active and you still have some tasks to finish before the loan is paid. Your current application contemplates a loan of $5000, over 48 months, paying back $197.90 monthly, but you can change these terms anytime before the loan is paid.

Together Loans is a cosigner-based lender.  This means all of our customers must have a cosigner for us to lend to them, regardless of the loan that you're applying for and your credit score. Normally, a cosigner is a friend or a family member who knows you (the borrower) and trusts that it is a good idea for you to borrow money. A suitable cosigner is someone who has a credit score of more than 700 and a strong history of paying their bills on time. Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.

How does the application journey work? When you apply online, we will send you a unique link for your cosigner to register. As soon as we have everything we need from both of you, we’ll transfer the money. The money is transferred into your cosigner's account. This is to protect them, and us, against identity fraud, as transferring the money into their account ensures that they are fully aware of the loan.

You can check here more information about the application journey and common questions: https://togetherloans.com/faq 

To complete your application journey and check what is the next step, you can use this link: https://tcrdt.com/s/HT7LYD50

Any other questions, please let me know.

Have a nice day,
Aldrine@Together Loans

interactions.body:
(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0634331811220908123302] Hi Carlos, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 750
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/2DE8GXRT

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi Ha, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, and we should too! They can be ANYONE who is a US resident, has 750+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! You'll find tips here: https://transformcredit.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/8WJISPPR - we'd love your loan to add to the $25million we've already paid out. If you still can't find a cosigner, please respond CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Jade, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0610290203230634020724] Hi Crystal,

Thank you for letting us know you didn't submit an application as cosigner.

We want to highlight that at Transform Credit, a loan application is created only when a consumer applies with their details through our Transform Credit website. However, rest assured that we do various checks, before agreeing to any loan, and a loan could never be paid out without first verifying the identity of the consumer. We also speak to all customers over the phone or video before any funds are released so it's extremely unlikely your details could ever be used fraudulently to finalize a loan.
 
We can confirm that this loan application is now canceled, and no loan is paid out. In order to further protect you, we have also added a flag to this case so that should the application be attempted again in the future, it will be automatically blocked from progressing further.

If you have any more questions or need further support, we will be happy to help.
 
Best regards,
TransformCredit

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0610290203230634020724] Hi Lewis, to continue your application, you will need a new cosigner. Please, use this link to invite them: https://tcrdt.com/s/0W7WHQFM  We aim to pay out every loan within 24 hours of the cosigner being accepted. If you and your cosigner complete the application online and all checks are completed without issue, we could get the money to you sooner! If you need any help, just let me know. Thanks, Transform Credit

interactions.body: (Borrower GT Rule 1 SMS) Hi James, all of our customers must have a cosigner. It's a great sign someone trusts you, so we should too! They can be ANYONE who has a 700+ credit and good history of paying their bills. Homeowners with slightly lower scores will also have a good chance of approval. Remember, if you pay on time, your cosigner will NEVER have to pay! Find tips here: https://togetherloans.com/cosigner-loans. When you do find someone, give them this link https://tcrdt.com/s/OLYEJ16B - we'd love to add you to the 40,000 customers we have already helped like you. If you still can't find a cosigner, please reply CANCEL so I can reserve the loan for someone else. Ben, Together Loans

(Borrower Cancellation GT Rule 1 Follow-Up SMS) Hi James, we understand you aren't able to provide a cosigner, so we've canceled your application for now. If you wish to reapply in the future, please visit: https://togetherloans.com James, Together Loans

[Affordability Confirmation] To Amy Benefield,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Other Expenses: $1000
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $191.870000
To be safe: $50

Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body:
(AI CB ORANGE - Already cancelled Email) [RE: Refund] Hi CYNTHIA,

Thanks for getting in touch.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

I can see that you signed up for a Together Loans CreditBuilder account when applying for a loan of $3250, on 11/07/2025. We sent you a ‘Welcome to Credit Builder' email on sign-up, confirming your account, how it works and how you can manage it.

Your CreditBuilder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

However, I can confirm that your CreditBuilder account has been canceled, so no further payments will be taken. If you wish to set-up a new CreditBuilder account, you can do so here https://tglns.com/s/DWWW738C. CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. You can find out more about CreditBuilder here: https://togetherloans.com/together-loans-credit-builder/

Together Loans can still help you access funds of up to $10,000 with the help of a cosigner. You can always access your application here: https://tglns.com/s/AW27G530

If you need help, please let me know.

Many thanks,
Ben, Together Loans

interactions.body:
Hi Jennie,

Thank you for letting us know you don't believe you submitted an application with us.

We want to highlight that at Transform Credit, a loan application is created only when a consumer applies with their details through our Transform Credit website. However, rest assured that we do various checks, before agreeing to any loan, and a loan could never be paid out without first verifying the identity of the consumer. We also speak to all customers over the phone or video before any funds are released so it's extremely unlikely your details could ever be used fraudulently to finalize a loan.
 
We can confirm that this loan application is now canceled, and no loan is paid out. In order to further protect you, we have also added a flag to this case so that should the application be attempted again in the future, it will be automatically blocked from progressing further.

If you have any more questions or need further support, we will be happy to help.
 
Best regards,
Divya@TransformCredit

Thanks for choosing Transform Credit, we have attached your Proposed Credit Contract with this email for you to keep. This does not mean that your application has been approved, but it gives you a chance to read and understand the terms of the agreement. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application but we do recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

To finalize your application please complete all of the required steps online - https://transformcredit.com/hub?aref=0612303501030400230629

Amber @ Transform Credit

[Affordability Confirmation] To Stephanie Donerson,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to charges of criminal fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: Stephanie Donerson
IP: 172.56.43.218
DateTime (UTC): 07-26-2024
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $5500
Rent: $1575
Bills: $200
Other Expenses: $300
Your Credit Commitments: $250
Transform Credit Repayment: $137.390000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $2987.610000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body:
(AI CB RED - No refund Email) [RE: Stop] Hi John,

Thank you for reaching out.

When you applied for a loan with us, we offered two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, building up their credit score.

The CreditBuilder is offered to everyone that applies for a loan with us, and our customers will have the choice to sign up or not sign up for the CreditBuilder loan, as part of the application process. I can see that on 08/05/2025, when you applied for this loan of $3250, you also reached the page where the CreditBuilder product was explained and offered, and you chose to sign up when clicked on “ok, set up my account”.

After signing up, we immediately sent you a “Welcome to Transform CreditBuilder!” email, confirming your account, and further explaining the benefits of the product you had opted into. I can see this was sent to you at 08/05/2025 to jsutton333@yahoo.com. The email also provided you with your login link, so you could access your account and manage/cancel it, at any time, even before the first payment.

When you signed up for CreditBuilder, you took the first step in building your score. Each month you pay $5, we report these payments to the Credit Bureaus as interest against the loan that has been held on your behalf. These successful payments build your credit history, helping to improve your score. The great thing about CreditBuilder is that if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full and so missed payments can never undo the positive impact that your on-time payments have been making on your credit score. Our customers use CreditBuilder as a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment.

Since 08/05/2025, we’ve sent you monthly payment reminders to your email address above, reminding you that your $5 CreditBuilder payment was due. These reminders again provided you with your login details, where you were able to manage or cancel your CreditBuilder, should you have decided you no longer wanted to benefit from the product. We’ve also been reporting the CreditBuilder loan to Experian, demonstrating any payments you have made. As these on-time payments accumulate, they contribute positively to your overall credit score, paving the way for better credit opportunities in the future.

Based on the above, we will be unable to issue you a refund for the payments that you made during this period. You chose to actively benefit from the product during this time, despite us being open and honest in all of our messages about your CreditBuilder account; including giving you the opportunity to close this at any point in time.

However, your Credit Builder account is now canceled and will now be marked as paid and settled on your credit report. Once again, please rest assured that you do not and never have owed us any money under this Credit Builder loan.

Many thanks,
Ben, Transform Credit

interactions.body:
(AI CB RED - Identity theft confusion Email) [RE: Cancel application.] Hi John,

Thank you for your email.

I understand that you're concerned an open account with us is appearing on your credit report and you are worried that you may be a victim of identity fraud. I have investigated your concerns and am pleased to be able to confirm that you do not owe Together Loans any money and no funds have been paid out to anyone in your name. The account showing on your credit report is related to our Credit Building product that you opened with us, but don't worry, this does not mean you have any outstanding liability to us.

When you applied for a loan with us on 08/05/2025, we offered you two different products: Loans up to $10,000 with a co-signer, and CreditBuilder, which is a small loan held on our customer's behalf that customers make monthly payments against, helping to build up their credit score. CreditBuilder is offered to everyone that applies for a loan with us, and our customers will have the choice to sign up or not, as part of their application process. I can see that when you reached the page where the CreditBuilder product was explained and offered, you chose to proceed with it.

After doing so, we immediately sent you a “Welcome to Together Loans Builder!” email to jsutton333@yahoo.com, confirming your account and giving you access to login and manage it yourself. The email explained again that we would collect monthly payments of $5 a month from you which would be reported to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score! We also explained that if you decided to cancel or stop paying, CreditBuilder would simply be settled and marked as paid in full - preventing any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

We sent this to you on 08/05/2025, and we've also been sending you a payment reminder before collecting your CreditBuilder payment reminding you that your $5 payment was due to the same address since. It's probably worth you checking your spam folder in case the emails have been sent there but everything I can see points to an account that was opened intentionally by yourself, in line with the events above.

However, given the confusion that has occurred, I have proactively canceled your Credit Builder account assuming this is not something you wish to benefit from further. Your Credit Builder loan will also now be marked as paid and settled on your credit report. Once again, please rest assured that you do not and never have owed us any money under this Credit Builder loan.

I hope I have been able to resolve your concerns, however, should you have any further concerns or queries, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Many thanks,
Ben, Together Loans

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. [Affordability Confirmation] To James Schmidt,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: James Schmidt
IP: 209.76.51.107
DateTime (UTC): 07-10-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $1200
Rent: $550
Bills: $120
Other Expenses: $150
Your Credit Commitments: $0
Transform Credit Repayment: $177.130000
To be safe: $50
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $152.870000


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

[Your Transform Credit Cosigner Application Ref: 0602182101130109010612] No longer needed

[Your TransformCredit Loan Application : 0602182101130109010612] Hi Richard,

We pay the funds out to the co-signer rather than the borrower for 3 key reasons. These are:

1) To verify the co-signer’s identity and prevent identity fraud from being committed against them, as they have to provide us with an account that is active, valid, in their name and capable of ACH payments that we pay the funds into. 
2) To make sure that the co-signer is fully aware of the loan and provide them an opportunity to return to the funds to us, if they are unsure on whether this financial responsibility is something they want to continue with.
3) By transferring the funds to the co-signer for them to transfer to the borrower, they're confirming their roles and responsibilities on this loan. Additionally, because they agree to make any payments that the borrower does not, we can then use these bank details as a backup payment method if the account goes past due. 

Being a cosigner is a serious financial commitment and it is important that any cosigner fully understands their role and the responsibilities, and obligations that come with becoming a co-signer. We believe that paying the funds out to them allows them to confirm their understanding and make a fully informed decision, before committing to these responsibilities.  

If you have any other questions, please let me know. 

Thanks, 
Aleiza@TransformCredit

[Your Transform Credit Loan Application Ref: 0634182701273304070904] Hello SASHA,

Thank you for starting your Transform Credit loan application. 

Below is a link where you can view/download our free Credit Education Program. You're not required to do anything with this in order to proceed with your application, but we recommend reviewing the content as you may find it helpful.

https://transformcredit.com/credit-education-program?state=fl

Transform Credit Inc.

[Affordability Confirmation] To SASHA PEREZ,

Thank you for your loan application. In line with applicable regulations we have asked you a number of questions regarding your income and normal expenditure, in order to assess your ability to afford this loan.

The Information you gave us in response to these questions has allowed us to determine that you can afford this loan. Please review the details below and ensure that you are comfortable that you have been honest and complete in your answers to our questions, and that the income and expenditure figures give a clear picture of your financial position and ability to meet repayments. If you feel that the details you have provided are incomplete PLEASE CONTACT US IMMEDIATELY, before the loan is paid out. If you have received money from us already, please return this immediately so that the loan to you can be cancelled. Receiving money based on false representations made during an application can leave you exposed to litigation for misrepresentation and fraud, which is a felony under US Law.

IF THE INFORMATION BELOW IS CORRECT, YOU DO NOT NEED TO REPLY TO THIS EMAIL.

Information provided to Transform Credit by you:

Borrower: SASHA PEREZ
IP: 174.227.239.171
DateTime (UTC): 11-24-2025
Stated Monthly Income: Full Time Employed $3000,Self Employed $150
Rent: $466.00
Bills: $200.00
Other Expenses: $60.00
Your Credit Commitments: $0.00
Transform Credit Repayment: $177.13
To be safe: $50.00
Total available after expenditure and this loan repayment: $2196.87


Yours sincerely
Transform credit Applications Dept

interactions.body:
Hi rose,
Thank you for reaching out. We understand your concerns and I want to reassure you that we are a legitimate lender, incorporated in Delaware and based primarily out of Chicago. We have been lending for over 7 years, across 22 different states, all of which require licensing. You can find this information on our website: https://togetherloans.com/Licenses. We are also registered with Nationwide Multistate Licensing System (NMLS), with license number 1905055. We have annual state audits in order to maintain our licenses, and if there were any significant issues, we would be unable to lend. We are currently applying for accreditation with the BBB which means we will be able to point customers to review our services there also, giving us a real rating. BBB has also investigated our business and was satisfied with our responses, which have been published on our page. I hope this information provides you with the peace of mind needed to move forward with us. Please let us know if you have any further questions or concerns.
Thanks,
Together Loans

interactions.body:
[Your Together Loans Loan Application : 0609083329021905210723] Hi rose,

We pay the funds out to you rather than the borrower for 3 key reasons. These are:

1) To verify your identity and prevent identity fraud from being committed against you, as you have to provide us with an account that is active, valid, in your name and capable of ACH payments that we pay the funds into. 
2) To make sure that you are fully aware of the loan and provide you with an opportunity to return to the funds to us, if you are unsure on whether this financial responsibility is something you want to continue with.
3) By transferring the funds to you to transfer to the borrower, you're confirming your roles and responsibilities on this loan. Additionally, because you agree to make any payments that the borrower does not, we can then use these bank details as a backup payment method if the account goes past due. 

Being a cosigner is a serious financial commitment and it is important that any cosigner fully understands their role and the responsibilities, and obligations that come with becoming a co-signer. We believe that paying the funds out to the co-signer allows them to confirm their understanding and make a fully informed decision, before committing to these responsibilities.  

If you have any other questions, please let me know. 

Thanks, 
Divya@Together Loans

[Your Together Loans Loan Application : 0609083329021905210723] Hi Albert,

Thanks for reaching out. We tried to call you and Rose to assist but were unable to reach either of you.

Timeframes for approval vary. Approval depends on how quickly your cosigner can complete their application, verify their information, and agree to the verbal contract. Unfortunately, there is no set timeframe to confirm approval.

(Borrower GT Default Email) [RE:Need help finding a cosigner?] Hi Marissa, 

Here at Transform Credit, we only offer cosigner loans. Providing a cosigner means we're able to lend to you, even if your credit score is below 500. If your cosigner trusts you then we will too. Your cosigner can be ANYONE you know (family, friend, neighbor, colleague or even your in-laws!) who:

- Is a US resident
- Is over 23 
- Has a credit score of more than 750
- Homeowners are more likely to be accepted even if they have a slightly lower score, as long as they have a history of paying their debts on time.
- Trusts you and will pay if you do not 
- Will give correct contact details and sign the agreement

More information about our cosigner requirements can be found here: https://transformcredit.com/faq. Send this link to your cosigner so they can register online in 2 minutes: https://tcrdt.com/s/S0CWYQY3

If you are not able to find a cosigner, please let me know by responding to this email with "CANCEL". You can reapply at any time by visiting: https://transformcredit.com

Thanks,
Transform Credit

Hi Marissa, we require the co-signer's banking information for the following reasons:

1) To verify identity and prevent identity fraud from being committed against the co-signer, as they have to provide us with an active account, valid in their name, and capable of ACH payments that we pay the funds into.

2) The funds will also be deposited into the co-signer’s bank account. This makes sure that the co-signer is fully aware of the loan and provides them with an opportunity to return the funds to us if they are unsure about whether this financial responsibility is something they want to continue with.

3) By transferring the funds to the co-signer to transfer to the borrower, they're confirming their roles and responsibilities on this loan. Additionally, because they agree to make any payments that the borrower does not, we can then use these bank details as a backup payment method if the account goes past due.

Being a cosigner is a serious financial commitment, and it is important that any cosigner fully understands their role and the responsibilities and obligations that come with becoming a cosigner. We believe that paying the funds out to the co-signer allows them to confirm their understanding and make a fully informed decision before committing to these responsibilities.

If you have any other questions, please let me know.
Thanks, 
Together Loans

interactions.body:
(Borrower CreditBuilder - CANCEL Email) [RE:A message from Transform Credit] Hi Jesse,
 
Thanks for getting in touch.
 
I can see that on 06/01/2025 you signed up for a CreditBuilder account AND applied for a $10000 loan. I can confirm that I have canceled your Transform CreditBuilder, you will not be charged again.

The transform credit builder helps build your credit, even if you do not borrow from us. 

When you sign up for CreditBuilder, you take the first step in building your score over 1-2 years. Each month you pay $5, which we report to the Credit Bureaus as interest against a loan that is held on your behalf. These successful payments build up your credit history, helping to improve your score. Once the loan term is completed, or if you decide to cancel/stop paying, CreditBuilder is simply marked as paid in full. This prevents any missed payments from undoing the positive impact that your on-time payments have on your credit score.

CreditBuilder is a fantastic stepping stone towards seeing the benefits of an improving credit score, without the responsibility of taking on a big financial commitment. When you do find yourself ready, with the help of a co-signer, TransformCredit can help you access funds too! At which point, any CreditBuilder loan you have will be paid in full on your behalf.

You can find out more about the Transform CreditBuilder here - transformcredit.com/transform-credit-builder/

We still have your loan application approved for you. All you need is a cosigner, a friend or a family member who has a 700+ credit score and agrees to make the payment if you can't. 

If you need help, please let me know
 
Have a great day, 
James, TransformCredit
